raw_messages.content:
# Current Date Context
The current date is 2024-05-15 (Wednesday). When users mention dates without specifying the year, always assume they refer to 2024. All flight searches and reservations should use 2024 dates unless explicitly stated otherwise.

Hey, I'm Aarav. I need to make some changes to my upcoming flight. I'm traveling from Atlanta to Philadelphia and I want to switch to the cheapest economy flight available, but for the day after my original reservation. Can you assist with that?

Sure, I can help with that. Could you please provide me with your original reservation details, including the first and last name, and the date of your original reservation? This will help me find the correct flight to update.

It seems like there was an issue finding your user details. Could you please provide me with the first and last name, and the date of your original reservation so I can look up the correct information for you?
Sure, my first name is Aarav and my last name is Garcia. My original reservation is for November 15th. Can you find my details now?
